name: CYNATA THERAPEUTICS
summary: CYNATA THERAPEUTICS is a stock ticker representing Cynata Therapeutics, an Australian stem cell and regenerative medicine company focused on developing and commercializing a novel stem cell technology called Cymerus™. The Cymerus™ technology enables the scalable production of mesenchymal stem cells (MSCs) for therapeutic use. Cynata is developing MSC-based therapies for various diseases, including graft-versus-host disease (GvHD) and critical limb ischemia (CLI) and is listed on the Bourse EuroNext exchange.
